Byte2.Desc: Controller Type lookup in in table.
Aspiration Type lookup in in table.
Injection Type lookup in in table.
FuelType Type lookup in in table.
Chassis Type lookup in in table.
Power Steering switch state (0 - off center, 1 - on center)

Byte3.Desc: In field mode if equals 0xEC and complement is 0x13
In field mode if equals 0x13 and field mode is 0xEC
In field mode if equals 0xEC and complement is 0x13
In field mode if equals 0x13 and field mode is 0xEC

Byte2.Desc: Non-zero means valid SBEC-II module type
